introText: Losing a loved one in a preventable accident is devastating. The Azizi Firm provides compassionate representation for families throughout Fresno who have lost a family member due to negligence. We help families pursue wrongful death claims to recover compensation for funeral expenses, lost income, loss of companionship, and more.

sections.body: Our Fresno wrongful death lawyers handle cases involving fatal car accidents on Highway 99 and Highway 41, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, pedestrian accidents, agricultural workplace accidents, defective products, medical malpractice, and premises liability.

sections.header: Who Can File a Wrongful Death Claim?
sections.body: In California, wrongful death claims may be filed by the deceased person's surviving spouse, domestic partner, children, or other dependents. In some cases, parents or siblings may also have standing.

faq.question: What damages can I recover in a wrongful death case?
faq.answer: You may recover funeral and burial expenses, loss of financial support, loss of household services, loss of love and companionship, and the deceased's pain and suffering before death.

faq.question: How long do I have to file a wrongful death claim?
faq.answer: California's statute of limitations for wrongful death is generally two years from the date of death. Do not delay - contact us for a free evaluation.

whyHireText: We handle wrongful death cases with the compassion and dedication they deserve. Our legal team understands the emotional and financial hardship of losing a loved one and fights to secure the maximum compensation for Fresno families.
contactUsText: Contact The Azizi Firm today for a free, confidential consultation about your family's wrongful death case. We work on a contingency fee basis - no fees unless we win.
